qwen3.user_experience: Perpetual 'thinking' spinner (생각 중...) — identical to #363, #365, #366. Phase3-B25 HTTP/1.1 hold + Connection: close did NOT resolve the issue.

details.prompt_used: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
details.thinking_duration: >80 seconds with no response or warning

qwen3.verdict: STILL_STUCK_ON_THINKING — Phase3-B25 (HTTP/1.1 hold + Connection: close) did NOT fix qwen3 spinner. 4th consecutive test (#363, #365, #366, #368) with same result. The block response body is still not being rendered by the browser.

details.outcome: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED — GOAWAY tears down HTTP/2 connection entirely. fetch() fails with TypeError: Failed to fetch. No warning shown.

v0.verdict: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED — Already tested in #367. h2_mode=1 (GOAWAY) is WORSE than h2_mode=2. Kills connection entirely, preventing any response delivery.

summary: Phase3-B25 build FAILED to fix spinner issue. qwen3: STILL_STUCK_ON_THINKING (same as #363/#365/#366). v0: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED (same as #367, GOAWAY kills connection). Neither HTTP/1.1 hold+Connection:close nor GOAWAY approach delivers the warning to the browser. The fundamental problem remains: the block response body is not being consumed/rendered by the browser's JavaScript SSE/fetch handler.
